lux.title: Install Tidio Live Chat on Lux Neon
lux.description: Install the Tidio live chat app from Shopify App Store. Free plan includes live chat, chatbot, and mobile app so you can reply to customer inquiries from your phone.
steps: Go to Shopify Admin > Apps > Search 'Tidio'
Install 'Tidio - Live Chat & AI Chatbot'
Create a Tidio account (use goodneonsigns@gmail.com)
Set your chat widget color to match Lux branding (dark theme, orange accent #ff7b00)
Set welcome message: 'Hey! 👋 Welcome to Lux Neon Art Gallery. How can I help you today?'
Enable auto-responses for common questions (hours, location, custom neon pricing)
Download the Tidio mobile app so you can reply from your phone
Set offline message: 'We are currently away. Leave your name and number and we will get back to you ASAP!'
Test it by visiting luxneonartgallery.com

lux.title: Verify & Optimize Google Business Profile
lux.description: Make sure your Google Business Profile is claimed, verified, and fully optimized. This is critical for 'near me' searches and local SEO. Google Maps = free leads.
steps: Go to business.google.com and search for 'Lux Neon Art Gallery'
Claim the listing if not already claimed (verify via phone or postcard)
Update business hours: Mon-Sat 11 AM - 7 PM
Add all services: Art Gallery, Custom Neon Signs, Event Venue, Podcast Studio
Upload 20+ high-quality photos (gallery interior, artwork, events, exterior)
Add your phone number: (954) 477-2768
Add website: luxneonartgallery.com
Write a keyword-rich business description (250+ words)
Enable messaging so customers can message you from Google
Ask 5-10 happy customers to leave Google reviews this week
Post a Google Business update about current exhibitions

lux.title: Update Lux Neon Homepage SEO (Shopify Admin)
lux.description: Go to Shopify Admin > Online Store > Preferences. Update the Homepage title and meta description. Jackie cannot do this via API.
steps: Log into Shopify Admin at bc414e-2.myshopify.com/admin
Go to Online Store > Preferences
Set Homepage title to: Lux Neon Art Gallery | LED Fine Art, Custom Neon Signs & Event Venue | Dania Beach FL

Set Meta description to: South Florida's premier LED fine art gallery featuring neon art, custom signs, and pop art by local artists. Visit our Dania Beach gallery, rent our event space, or shop 350+ original pieces online.
Click Save

lux.title: Give Jackie Access to Google Business Profile
lux.description: Add Jackie's Google account as a manager on the Lux Neon GBP listing so she can optimize it, post updates, respond to reviews, and manage local SEO.
steps: Go to business.google.com
Select 'Lux Neon Art Gallery' listing
Click the 3-dot menu or 'Users' / 'Managers'
Click 'Add User' or 'Invite New Manager'
Add jackypanty647@gmail.com as a Manager
Confirm the invitation
Tell Jackie once done so she can accept and start optimizing

lux.title: Share Google Ads Account Access with Jackie
lux.description: Jackie needs access to your Google Ads account to set up and manage campaigns for Lux Neon. Share the account or invite her email.
steps: Go to ads.google.com
If you don't have an account yet: Create one using goodneonsigns@gmail.com
Go to Tools & Settings > Access and Security
Click the blue + button to invite a user
Add jackypanty647@gmail.com with 'Standard' access level
Set a monthly budget you're comfortable with (recommended: $30-50/day to start)
Share your Google Ads Customer ID (10-digit number at top of the page) with Jackie
If you already have the Google Ads tag (AW-11110782537) linked, mention that too

lux.title: Give Jackie Google Cloud Console Access
lux.description: Jackie needs access to your Google Cloud Console to set up the Google Business Profile API and Google Ads API. This lets her manage your GBP listings and ad campaigns programmatically.
steps: Go to https://console.cloud.google.com
If you don't have a project yet: Click 'Select a project' > 'New Project' > name it 'Lux Neon' > Create
Once in the project, go to 'IAM & Admin' > 'IAM' in the left sidebar
Click '+ GRANT ACCESS' at the top
In 'New principals' enter: jackypanty647@gmail.com
For Role, select 'Editor' (this gives Jackie access to set up APIs)
Click 'Save'
Then go to 'APIs & Services' > 'Library'
Search for and ENABLE these APIs: 'My Business Business Information API', 'My Business Account Management API', 'Google Ads API'
Tell Jackie the Project ID (shown at top of console) when done

lux.title: Add Jackie as Editor in Google Cloud IAM
lux.description: The APIs are enabled but Jackie still needs IAM access to the project to create OAuth credentials and manage the APIs.
steps: Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/iam?project=angelic-bee-490015-s0
Click '+ GRANT ACCESS' at the top of the page
In 'New principals' enter: jackypanty647@gmail.com
Click 'Select a role' dropdown
Choose 'Basic' > 'Editor'
Click 'Save'
That's it! Tell Jackie when done.

lux.title: Update hours to 10AM-6PM on Google, Yelp, Facebook, TripAdvisor
lux.description: Website is updated. Now update third-party listings to match. Google is highest priority — most aggregators pull from it.
steps: Google Business Profile: business.google.com > Lux Neon > Hours > Mon-Fri close at 6:00 PM
Yelp: biz.yelp.com > Business Info > Hours (fix Sat/Sun to By Appointment instead of Closed)
Facebook: Page Settings > Business Info > Hours
TripAdvisor: Owner portal > Update hours

lux.title: Audit & disable unnecessary Shopify app scripts on homepage
lux.description: 77 scripts loading on homepage. Many apps only needed on specific pages.

lux.title: Find and remove 334KB polyfill bundle (injected by app)
Convert remaining large PNGs to WebP across all templates
lux.description: mika_queen1 (506KB), event-space (288KB), rainbow (243KB)

lux.title: Consolidate fragmented CSS (20+ files per page)
Reduce HTML payload from 195KB to under 50KB
Add loading=lazy to all below-fold images
Create local SEO landing pages for 0-difficulty keywords
lux.description: neon signs Fort Lauderdale, custom neon signs Miami, podcast studio Fort Lauderdale, event venue Dania Beach

lux.title: Fix CLS caused by uppromote affiliate banner injection
Set Up Lyro AI in Tidio Dashboard
lux.description: Jackie installed Tidio live chat and delivered full Lyro AI setup instructions. Now you just need to enable and configure Lyro AI in the Tidio dashboard. Instructions were sent — this is a quick 10-minute setup.
steps: Log into app.tidio.com
Go to Automation → Lyro AI
Enable Lyro AI
Add your FAQ content (hours, pricing, location, services)
Set fallback action: 'Forward to live agent'
Test with a sample question

lux.title: Update Hours on Google Business, Yelp, Facebook, TripAdvisor
lux.description: Lux Neon hours may be outdated or inconsistent across platforms. Consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone + Hours) is critical for local SEO.
steps: Google Business: business.google.com → Edit profile → Hours
Yelp: biz.yelp.com → Business Information → Hours
Facebook: Your page → Edit Page Info → Hours
TripAdvisor: Your listing → Edit → Business Details → Hours
Make sure all show the same hours

lux.title: Tidio Hidden for Admin Users
lux.description: Configured Tidio live chat widget to be hidden from logged-in admin users so it doesn't clutter the store management experience.

lux.title: 28 Neon Sign Images Generated & Uploaded
lux.description: Generated and uploaded 28 AI neon sign product images to Lux Neon store using OpenAI image generation.

lux.title: Spartan Warrior Product Created ($400)
lux.description: Created the Spartan Warrior neon sign product listing on Lux at $400 price point.

lux.title: Flickity JS Bug Fixed
lux.description: Fixed Flickity carousel JavaScript bug that was causing layout issues on Lux storefront.

lux.title: PageFly Disabled
lux.description: Disabled PageFly page builder app on Lux to reduce script bloat and improve page load speed.

lux.title: Footer Macarons Link Removed
lux.description: Removed outdated macarons link from the Lux Neon footer navigation.

lux.title: Event Venue Campaign Plan Ready
lux.description: Complete Google Ads campaign plan drafted for Lux Event Venue Rental. Ready to launch once OAuth is authorized.

lux.title: Lux Business Profile Saved
lux.description: Saved and documented the full Lux Neon business profile including contact info, hours, services, and social handles.

lux.title: Google Ads Conversion Tracking Setup
lux.description: Setting up conversion tracking for Google Ads campaigns (form submissions, calls, purchases). Blocked pending OAuth authorization from Lex.

goodneon.title: Swap 864KB mock image in Elementor homepage editor with optimized WebP (16x23-mock-optimized in media library)
Enable Cloudflare APO for WordPress ($5/mo) in Cloudflare dashboard
Generate New GoodNeon WP App Password
goodneon.description: The GoodNeon WordPress app password expired. Jackie cannot post, edit, or manage any GoodNeon content without it. Need a fresh app password to restore access.
steps: Log into GoodNeon WordPress admin
Go to Users → Your Profile (top right of admin)
Scroll down to 'Application Passwords'
Create a new app password named 'Jackie'
Copy and send the generated password to Jackie in Discord

coconut.title: Set up Klaviyo account for Coconut Bikini & share API key with Jackie

reclaimed.title: Set up Klaviyo account for Reclaimed Closet & share API key with Jackie
Add Size Chart link to footer navigation
reclaimed.description: Size chart page is live at /pages/size-chart. Add the link to your footer menu.
steps: Go to Shopify Admin > Online Store > Navigation
Click 'Footer' menu
Click 'Add menu item'
Name: 'Size Chart', Link: /pages/size-chart
Save

reclaimed.title: Add navigation scopes to Jackie's Reclaimed app
reclaimed.description: Jackie needs read_navigation + write_navigation scopes to manage menus via API.
steps: Go to Shopify Partners > Apps > Jackie's Reclaimed Closet app
Configuration > API access scopes
Add: read_navigation, write_navigation
Save and re-authorize the app

shirtsy.title: Claim Shirtsy profile on Trustpilot
shirtsy.description: Go to trustpilot.com/review/shirtsy.com and claim the business profile. Currently unclaimed with 2.3/5 rating.
steps: Go to trustpilot.com/review/shirtsy.com
Click 'Is this your company?' or 'Claim your profile'
Verify ownership via email (use shirtsy business email)
Once claimed, Jackie will draft responses to all reviews

shirtsy.title: Respond to BBB complaints (F rating fix)
shirtsy.description: Shirtsy has an F rating because of 2 unanswered complaints. Responding alone should improve the grade.
steps: Log into BBB at bbb.org
Go to Shirtsy LLC profile > Complaints
Respond to all 3 complaints (Jackie will draft responses)
Consider applying for BBB Accreditation (~$500/yr)

shirtsy.title: Create/verify Google Business Profile for Shirtsy
shirtsy.description: Shirtsy may not have a Google Business Profile. Need one to collect Google Reviews.
steps: Search 'Shirtsy' on Google Maps
If no listing: create one at business.google.com
Business: Shirtsy LLC, 1210 Stirling Rd STE 1A, Dania Beach FL 33004
Category: Custom T-shirt Store / Printing Service
Verify via mail or phone

shirtsy.title: Provide Shirtsy WP Admin Credentials
shirtsy.description: Jackie has 6 blog post drafts ready to publish on Shirtsy and 3 off-topic posts to delete. Cannot do any of this without WordPress admin access.
steps: Send Jackie the Shirtsy WordPress admin URL (likely shirtsy.com/wp-admin)
Either: share admin username + password
Or: Go to Users → Add New → create a new admin user for Jackie
Or: Go to your profile → Application Passwords → create 'Jackie' app password

shirtsy.title: 6 New Shirtsy Blog Posts Drafted
shirtsy.description: Wrote 6 new blog post drafts for Shirtsy. Ready to publish once WP credentials are provided.

all.title: EMERGENCY: Fix Cloudflare caching user-specific pages (data leak)
all.description: Cloudflare was caching /my-account/ and /client-dashboard/ and serving them to other users. Purged all caches and added bypass rules on Crown, Shirtsy, GoodNeon.

all.title: Blog Audit & Cleanup: Lux (31), Coconut (26), Reclaimed (13), Crown (1)
all.description: Comprehensive blog audit and cleanup across all sites: 71 total fixes applied — SEO metadata, formatting, broken links, and content quality improvements.

all.title: ~45 Blog Articles Need Featured Images (Coconut & Reclaimed)
all.description: After blog audit, approximately 45 blog articles on Coconut Bikini and Reclaimed Closet are missing featured images. In progress — images being generated and assigned.

system.title: Click Google Ads OAuth Link (ONE CLICK — unblocks 3 campaigns)
system.description: Jackie built the OAuth callback at ops.jackiespanties.com/callback. You just need to click a link and paste the auth code back to Jackie. This unblocks all Google Ads automation: Custom Neon Signs optimization, Event Venue Rental ($40/day new campaign), and Podcast Studio campaign.
steps: Ask Jackie for the Google Ads OAuth authorization URL
Click the link — it opens Google sign-in
Sign in with your Google Ads account
Copy the auth code from the callback page
Paste the code to Jackie in Discord

system.title: Accept Call & Messaging Ads Terms in Google Ads
system.description: Before Jackie can set up call and message conversion tracking, you need to accept Google's Terms for Call Ads and Messaging Ads in your Google Ads account.
steps: Go to ads.google.com
Tools & Settings → Billing & Payments → look for any terms acceptance prompts
Or: Tools & Settings → Measurement → Conversions → look for call/messaging setup

luxdo.title: Claim @luxneon.do on Instagram and Facebook
luxdo.description: 30-day social media calendar and all content is ready for Lux Neon DR in Dominican Spanish. Jackie just needs the accounts to exist so content can be scheduled. Claim the handle before someone else does!
steps: Open Instagram → Create new business account → username: luxneon.do (or luxneondo)
Open Facebook → Create new Page → Lux Neon DR
Set profile photo (Lux Neon DR logo)
Add bio/description in Spanish
Connect both to Meta Business Suite
Send Jackie the account details so content can be scheduled

luxdo.title: Generate Shopify Admin Token (shpat_) for Lux DR Store
luxdo.description: Without a Shopify admin API token, Jackie cannot automate product uploads, blog posts, or any content changes to the DR store.
steps: Log into ydciat-m8.myshopify.com/admin
Go to Settings → Apps and Sales Channels
Click 'Develop apps'
Click 'Create an app' → name it 'Jackie'
Under 'API credentials' → Configure Admin API scopes (select all read/write)
Install the app → Copy the Admin API access token (starts with shpat_)
Send to Jackie in Discord

luxdo.title: Lux DR: Local SEO, Content Calendar, WhatsApp Templates, Social Plan
luxdo.description: Complete Dominican Republic market strategy delivered: local SEO plan, 30-day content calendar in Dominican Spanish, WhatsApp message templates, and social media plan for @luxneon.do.

luxdo.title: Lux DR Physical Address Confirmed (Gazcue, Santo Domingo)
luxdo.description: Confirmed and documented the Lux DR physical address in Gazcue, Santo Domingo for local SEO and business listings.

reclaimed-1.prompt: help me strategize a seasonal seo push, running weekly

shirtsy-3.prompt: give me a report when complete

shirtsy-3.response:
# Shirtsy Status Report — April 26, 2026

## Completed Tasks
- ✅ **6 New Shirtsy Blog Posts Drafted** (completed 2026-03-26T14:00:00Z)
  - Wrote 6 new blog post drafts for Shirtsy. Ready to publish once WP credentials are provided.

## Pending Tasks (Blocked — Need Lex Action)
- 🟡 **Claim Shirtsy profile on Trustpilot** [high]
  - Go to trustpilot.com/review/shirtsy.com and claim the business profile. Currently unclaimed with 2.3/5 rating.
  - Steps: 4 action items defined
- 🟡 **Respond to BBB complaints (F rating fix)** [high]
  - Shirtsy has an F rating because of 2 unanswered complaints. Responding alone should improve the grade.
  - Steps: 4 action items defined
- 🟡 **Create/verify Google Business Profile for Shirtsy** [high]
  - Shirtsy may not have a Google Business Profile. Need one to collect Google Reviews.
  - Steps: 5 action items defined
- 🔴 **Provide Shirtsy WP Admin Credentials** [critical]
  - Jackie has 6 blog post drafts ready to publish on Shirtsy and 3 off-topic posts to delete. Cannot do any of this without WordPress admin access.
  - Steps: 4 action items defined

## Key Blockers
1. **WP Admin Access** (CRITICAL) — Jackie has 6 blog posts drafted and 3 off-topic posts to delete. Cannot publish without credentials.
2. **Trustpilot Claim** — Shirtsy has 2.3/5 rating, unclaimed. Claiming allows review responses.
3. **BBB Complaints** — F rating due to 2-3 unanswered complaints. Responding alone should improve grade.
4. **Google Business Profile** — May not exist yet. Needed for Google Reviews and local SEO.

## Summary
- 1 task(s) complete, 4 task(s) pending
- All pending tasks are blocked on Lex providing access/credentials or taking manual action on external platforms
- 6 SEO blog posts are drafted and ready to publish the moment WP access is provided
shirtsy-3.summary: Shirtsy status report generated: 1 task complete (6 blog drafts), 4 tasks blocked pending Lex action (WP access, Trustpilot claim, BBB complaints, GBP creation)
